value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Sandbox /tmp/pm-ecosystem-audit-2026-06-12 exercised: core lifecycle (create all types incl custom Experiment via schema add-type, update, close w/ structured fields, comments/files/docs/notes/learnings, claim/release, deps via update --dep, list/search/context, validate --fix-hints, health --json, stats --storage, history --diff, gc, plan create/complete-step/materialize, aggregate, activity) all WORKING. Error UX verified strong: command did-you-mean (lsit->list), flag nearest-option + suggested_retry (create --desc -> --description), cross-command option hints (--depends-on -> plan), allowed-value lists w/ schema add-type hint, calendar unknown-command install hint. All 10 first-party packages installed from local paths and exercised OK (templates save/show + create --template, calendar agenda/day, todos export+import, beads import --file, guide, dedupe-audit/comments-audit/normalize, search-advanced, command-kit echo/parser-alias/injected flag, test-runs, lifecycle-hooks inert-by-design). pm-changelog installed locally, generated sane CHANGELOG from closed sandbox items.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: SDK: pm extension scaffold -> extended with registerCommand + registerItemFields + registerImporter; capability-gating error payload (health --json activation.failed error+trace+hint) is excellent; --field set/reject works; importer surfaces as 'pm auditcsv import'. MCP: node dist/mcp/server.js serves 25 tools, pm_list call OK against sandbox. FINDINGS FILED: pm-qtbc (P1: pm-mcp bin silent-exits via symlinked argv[1] main-module guard — npm-installed binary dead), pm-r2kd (P2: templates unknown subcommand silently lists), pm-yffj (P2: extension activation failure invisible outside health --json), pm-i35t (P3: alias typos shwo/veiw get no did-you-mean), pm-90hp (P3: todos import positional ignored + error omits --folder), pm-7x8d (P3: close could accept --resolution as reason under require_close_reason). No secret/private-info leaks observed in any output; telemetry defaults to capture_level redacted in fresh init.

value.author: codex-audit-20260618
value.text: Sub-agent package audit evidence: templates parent command exits 0 for invalid invocations; dynamic package commands also ignore excess positionals (templates show bug extra-token, templates save demo --type Task extra-token) and another parent/list alias shows same ambiguity (test-runs nope lists). Recommended tests: negative dynamic parser coverage and dogfood expected-failure probes. pm-r2kd covers templates fallback; broader arity enforcement may need a separate item if fixed centrally.

value.note: compatible Vitest/Sentry dependency updates from audit

value.author: codex-audit-agent
value.text: Final audit evidence: GitHub scan found no open PRs, no open Dependabot alerts, no open code-scanning alerts; open issues reviewed and GH #262/#265 fixed in this branch. Sentry issue list returned recent unresolved pm-cli issues; telemetry status enabled with recent successful flush and pm health --check-telemetry --summary --json returned ok with warning_count=0. Post-change gates: pnpm build; node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage (225 files, 4488 tests, 100%); pnpm dogfood:package-first (87 commands); pnpm security:scan && pnpm audit --audit-level moderate; pm validate --check-resolution --check-history-drift (history_drift ok, only 188 old missing-resolution warnings).

author: codex-audit-agent

patch.value: Completed the 2026-06-17/18 ecosystem audit pass with fixes for GH #262, GH #265, templates invalid fallback, and dynamic package command arity.
Audit current CLI/SDK/packages/GitHub/security/telemetry/Sentry state in temporary projects, fix high-impact agent UX issues found, and record evidence in PM.

Subagents audited packages and performance; fixed init, templates, dynamic command validation, linked-test-adapters, and schema shorthand; updated compatible dependencies; verified with full coverage, dogfood package-first, security/audit, validation, GitHub alert checks, Sentry issue list, and telemetry health.

value.author: codex-audit-agent
value.text: Final PR #266 verification update: after review feedback and GH #268-#270 fixes, local gates passed: focused suites; manual temp-project dist/cli.js smoke for init/path, schema typo, dynamic extension args/options, exact/short id search, list-blocked compact projection, and context markdown sections; node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage (226 files, 4495 tests, 100% statements/branches/functions/lines); node dist/cli.js changelog generate --check unchanged; pm validate --check-resolution --check-history-drift ok with known older 188 resolution warnings and history_drift ok; pnpm version:check && pnpm contracts:check && pnpm security:scan && pnpm quality:static && npm pack --dry-run passed. GitHub security refresh: Dependabot open alerts 0, code scanning open alerts 0; pnpm audit attempts timed out against npm audit endpoint and did not return vulnerability data.
